description: David said 'Fire the skill rigby-register'. Jarvis searched for the skill file in skills/ and .claude/skills/ directories but failed to find it at .claude/skills/rigby-register/SKILL.md. Then declared it doesn't exist. David had to point Jarvis to the exact path. This is a direct follow-up to err-20260327-002 — Jarvis still doesn't know where Rigby's skills live even after the earlier correction.
correction: The skill exists at .claude/skills/rigby-register/SKILL.md. When told to 'fire a skill', find the SKILL.md file and execute it as written. Skills live in both skills/ (IES skills) and .claude/skills/ (Cowork skills). Search both.
systemic_fix: When looking for a skill by name, search BOTH skills/ AND .claude/skills/ directories. The glob pattern should be **/{skill-name}*/SKILL.md across the full IES tree.
